mapper.select: SELECT id, functionary, name, type, description, duration, end_time, cover_path, created_at, submitted_by FROM pending_activities ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, functionary, name, type, description, duration, end_time, cover_path, created_at, submitted_by FROM pending_activities WHERE submitted_by = #{submittedBy} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT path FROM pending_attachments WHERE pending_activity_id = #{pendingActivityId}
SELECT student_no FROM pending_participants WHERE pending_activity_id = #{pendingActivityId}
